rows.source_ref: 1dominican, "Horizontal line system", ForexFactory Trading Systems forum, thread 1311677, n.d. — https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1311677/horizontal-line-system (community formalization by user rell4 in same thread; TRO / TheRumpledOne daily-open indicator lineage via kreslik.com/forums/therumpledone)
rows.concept: Breakout-continuation once price commits a fixed pip distance beyond the daily-open reference line, betting intraday momentum keeps extending away from the open.
rows.eligibility_reason: Deterministic daily-open stop-entry + fixed-pip SL, pure-MQL5 buildable on GBPUSD/.DWX, FTMO/DXZ-compatible; only TP is unspecified in the original (design-open — community Fibo-1.618 / trailing variants supply a concrete exit).
rows.notes: Core rules (1dominican, p1/p15): buy stop DO+10 pips / sell stop DO-10 pips on GBPUSD (gold & US30 use 20 pips), SL ~1 pip beyond the opposite side of the line (11 pips GBPUSD / 21 pips US30), never simultaneous long+short, single-pair focus, broker-time daily open. Original TP vague ('whatever you can get'). rell4 variant (p22-23): 9-pip line, Fibo 0=SL/1=entry/1.618=TP1, wait for 2nd breakout if a signal fires before 10:30 MT4 time else take the 1st, check calendar (high-impact '3-bull' events invalidate). Silkysilv variant: 10-pip hard SL, BE+1 at +5 pips, 5-pip trailing. No backtest/stats posted; multiple posters warn of whipsaws; low-reputability single-user showcase thread. Distinct from swing-MR — a session/structure (opening-range) breakout driver. Test fixed-R and trailing exit variants.

rows.source_ref: flashpaul (reply in same thread), ForexFactory thread 1311677, n.d. — https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1311677/horizontal-line-system
rows.concept: Enter when M1 EMA144/EMA89 and a multi-timeframe Supertrend(ATR5) align in the strategy's direction, worked in 4-hour blocks.
rows.eligibility_reason: Only 'open the trades when indicators aligned in accord with the strategy' is stated — no concrete entry trigger, SL, or TP; rules too vague to mechanize.
rows.notes: Secondary idea appended near thread end; TPL M1-H4.zip attached (chart template only) but no rule specification. Distinct from the main daily-open system; not implementable as written.

notes: Text-extractable PDF (fitz); 37 pages, ~60 forum posts. Two distinct strategies recorded: main daily-open breakout (ELIGIBLE, with rell4/Silkysilv exit variants folded in) and flashpaul EMA+Supertrend template (REJECTED, too vague).
No statistical evidence anywhere in the thread — screenshots only; whipsaw complaints from other posters lower confidence.
